Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Anthony Saldato, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Zacks, Ultrecht & Ledbetter
Brian Grone, Defendant in Propria Persona

RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's Motion For Order Compelling Defendant To Respond To Form Interrogatories And Request For Admissions And To Appear For Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to respond to Form Interrogatories and Request For Admissions within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant is ordered to appear for his deposition to be noticed by Plaintiff and to be completed no later than October 23, 2009. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
